# Best AI Image Generators for Book Covers in 2026

Professional book covers are expensive, but AI makes it possible to create stunning designs yourself!

Check out our [[link:/category/Image|Image category]] for more AI tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/1|Midjourney]]: Artistic Book Covers

[[link:/tools/1|Midjourney]] creates stunning, artistic book covers perfect for indie authors.

### Midjourney for Book Covers
- **Artistic style**: Unique, beautiful designs
- **Style consistency**: Create matching covers for series
- **High resolution**: Perfect for print and digital

**Try Midjourney**: https://midjourney.com

---

## [[link:/tools/2|DALL-E 3]]: Accessible Cover Design

[[link:/tools/2|DALL-E 3]] is easy to use and great for quick concept generation.

### DALL-E 3 for Book Covers
- **Easy prompts**: Great at understanding detailed descriptions
- **Consistent results**: More predictable than some tools
- **Text generation**: Can sometimes create readable cover text

**Try DALL-E 3**: https://openai.com/dall-e-3

---
